case_title: ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE CO. VS. REDWOOD HEALTH SERVICES

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE COMPANY'S PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE CO.'S MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976. (302)

RULING: The Court adopts the tentative ruling which is not contested. PETITIONER ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE CO.'S Motion To File Under Seal is granted.
